docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.
